probability.description: The assessed likelihood of this condition.
probability.title: Probability

critical.description: Whether this is a high-stakes, life-threatening emergency condition.
critical.title: Critical

short_rationale.description: One sentence on why this diagnosis is considered based on history/exam findings, including relevant key negatives.
short_rationale.title: Short Rationale

investigations.description: List of specific diagnostic investigations (e.g. ['CBC/CRP', 'Point-of-care Ultrasound']).
investigations.title: Investigations

indication.description: The specific suspected condition prompting this intervention (e.g., 'If suspecting Sepsis').
indication.title: Indication

treatment.description: Specific treatment intervention with dosages if relevant (e.g., 'Ceftriaxone 2g IV').
treatment.title: Treatment

important.description: Any key contraindications, warning signs, or monitoring parameters.
important.title: Important Warnings

disposition.description: Primary destination or clinical disposition (e.g., 'Admission/Observation/Home with follow-up').
disposition.title: Disposition

acute_warning.description: Red flag signs of an immediate, life-threatening emergency state. Return null if none.
acute_warning.title: Acute Warning

diagnoses.description: Prioritized differential diagnoses ranked by probability. Include critical rules even if low probability.
diagnoses.title: Differential Diagnoses

sources.description: List of peer-reviewed guidelines or reference tools utilized (e.g. 'UpToDate', 'NICE guidelines').
sources.title: Medical Sources
